series_metadata.series_description: Records posted to the ED STEPS Guidance Library include planning records for goals, strategies, action steps and district goal amounts for all grants in the ED STEPS System. The Funding Applications included are Consolidated, Competitive, Student Intervention, Career-Technical and Adult Education, Adult Basic and Literacy Education and Community School. Other documents include budgets, budget details, nonpublic services and other related pages.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: information becomes obsolete, superseded, or no longer of administrative or research value
